rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant'S Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Matters In Defendant'S Requests For Admission As Admitted By Plaintiff, Or, Alternatively, An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To The Requests For Admissions Without Objections
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANT BROWN & CO. REAL ESTATE, INC.'S Motion For Order Deeming Matters In Defendant's Requests For Admission As Admitted By Plaintiff, Or, Alternatively, An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To The Requests For Admissions Without Objections. Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on July 2, 2018. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of reply to department 301 no late than June 25, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Continued to July 13, 2018. By no later than July 26, 2018 Cross-Complainant shall file and serve a motion for leave to amend to add new causes of action (in compliance with CRC 3.1324); opposition, if any, shall be filed and served no later that July 6, 2018; reply shall be filed and served no later than July 10, 2018. Motion for leave to amend shall be calendared by cross-complainant for July 13, 2018. No motion for leave to amend outside the scope of demurrer to the Second Amended Cross-Complaint was properly before the Court on April 17, 2018. Demurrer to the Second Amended Cross-Complaint was sustained with leave to amend limited to the arguments raised in such demurrer. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF THE MARY L. ELLIS 2004 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. The Third Amended Cross Complaint states sufficient facts to support a cause of action under Welfare & Institutions Code section 15657.6. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT DUKE PARTNERS II LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend. The complaint is uncertain. (Code Civ. Proc. § 430.10, subd. (f).) Plaintiff must state in clear and unambiguous terms which causes of action are alleged against Duke Partners, LLC. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend. The complaint is uncertain. (Code Civ. Proc. § 430.10, subd. (f).) Plaintiff must state in clear and unambiguous terms (1) whether Wells Fargo Bank was a proper servicer of the subject loans, (2) Plaintiff's standing regarding Unit 4 in light of the transfer of interest prior to the Trustee's sale, and (3) which causes of action are alleged against Wells Fargo Bank. =(501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 25, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANT DAMIEN QUINN'S Motion To Amend Answer. DENIED without prejudice. Defendant may bring this motion again one last time. The motion must comply with CRC 3.1234 and the proposed answer must include only affirmative defenses supported by factual allegations. Defendant has been previously ordered to comply with legal authorities and procedures re: contents of the motion for leave to amend and contents of answer. Defendant, without explanation, failed to follow. =(501/GLW)
